title: Puerto Banus Cheap Catamaran Hire: 2026 Guide to Costs and Boats
html:
For a budget-friendly day on the water, cheap catamaran hire in Puerto Banus starts at around 50 EUR per person for a shared tour, with departures from the marina itself. BoatHire24 lists affordable options that make sailing the Mediterranean accessible without breaking the bank.

How much does it cost to hire a catamaran in Puerto Banus?

Prices for a full-day catamaran charter start at around 800 EUR for a 40 ft boat and can exceed 2,500 EUR for a luxury 70 ft model. These rates typically include a skipper and fuel, making it straightforward to plan your budget. For the best deals, you can browse boats for your dates on BoatHire24 to see real-time availability and compare prices across multiple operators.

Do you need a licence to rent a catamaran in Puerto Banus?

For bareboat catamaran hire in Spain, you usually need a recreational navigation licence (PER) or an equivalent international certificate. Most cheap catamaran hire options in Puerto Banus include a skipper, so you can relax without a licence. The operator will confirm exact requirements when you book, as regulations can vary depending on the boat size and distance from shore.

Where to set off in Puerto Banus

The main departure point is Puerto Banus Marina, the glamorous port in Marbella on the Costa del Sol. From here, you can set course for nearby spots such as Marbella Bay, the scenic coast of Benalmadena, or the exclusive resort of Sotogrande. For a longer day trip, head to the Gibraltar Strait or anchor off the island of Isla de las Palomas in Tarifa. The sheltered waters of the Bay of Malaga are also popular for families, with light winds and calm seas in high season.

Which boat to rent for cheap catamaran hire in Puerto Banus

  1. Shared catamaran tour, ideal for solo travellers or couples, with up to 12 guests, from 50 EUR per person.
  2. Small motorboat (e.g. Axopar 28), perfect for a half-day exploring coves, carrying up to 8 guests, from 350 EUR.
  3. Catamaran full-day (e.g. Lagoon 40), spacious for a family or group of 8, 10, from 800 EUR.
  4. crewed luxury yacht (e.g. Sunseeker 50), for a premium experience with up to 12 guests, from 1,500 EUR. For a popular choice, see this catamaran listing for full details and photos.

Costs of catamaran hire in Puerto Banus

  • Shared tour: 50, 80 EUR per person, typically 4 hours.
  • Small motorboat half-day: 350, 500 EUR for up to 8 guests.
  • Catamaran full-day: 800, 2,500 EUR for 10, 12 guests.
  • crewed yacht full-day: 1,500, 3,000 EUR for 8, 12 guests with premium service.

Best season for cheap catamaran hire in Puerto Banus

The high season runs from June to September, when the Levante wind can pick up in the afternoon, so morning departures are often calmer.

A local tip: book your catamaran for a full day in May or early June when the water is warm but prices are lower and anchorages are less crowded.
For 2026, expect similar patterns, with most operators offering discounts for early bookings.

At a glance

  • Price band: 50, 3,000 EUR per trip
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Typical trip length: 4 hours to full day
  • Guest capacity: 8, 12 on most catamarans
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Puerto Banus

Can I hire a catamaran for just a few hours?

Yes, many operators offer half-day hires of around 4 hours, especially for shared tours.

What is the best month for low prices?

May and October often have lower rates while still offering pleasant weather.

Are meals included in the hire cost?

Some full-day charters include a basic lunch or snacks, but always check the listing for details.

Can I bring my own food and drink?

Most skippers allow you to bring your own provisions, but confirm with the operator in advance.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Puerto Banus or list your own. To find the perfect vessel for your trip, browse the listings on boathire24.com and compare verified options from local owners. If you have a catamaran to rent in Puerto Banus, listing your boat can attract thousands of potential customers looking for affordable charters.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Puerto Banus and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
